feedItems.description: allocated £121.4m to Adult Social Care (≈£439 per resident)
allocated £82.0m to Children's Social Care (≈£297 per resident)
allocated £20.9m to Public Health (≈£75 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £72 (3.3%) to £2283
